steps.title: Identify what must be emphasized
steps.content: The prompt explicitly asks to emphasize when and where Argentum debuted. The notes provide: 2018 (the when) and New York City, New York (the where).

steps.title: Match the timing and location to the choices
steps.content: C places both “In 2018” and “in New York City, New York” at the sentence's opening, making the debut's timing and location immediately clear. A, B, and D either omit the work entirely, fail to specify the year or location clearly, or bury the timing in brackets without naming the location. That matches choice C — C is correct.
